title: Research and Development Survey 2025 – survey form | Stats NZ
content:
## Research and Development Survey 2025 – survey form
19 July 2024, 2:00pm
Your business has been selected for the Research and Development Survey 2025 (R&D).
Please download the editable PDF file below, complete the form, and return it by email to bus@stats.govt.nz .
If you have already completed and posted back a survey then you don’t need to do anything more – thank you for completing the R&D Survey 2025.
- Research and Development Survey 2025 - Form for businesses Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 2.6 MB

### Research and Development Survey 2025 - Form for businesses
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 2.6 MB
To complete the form please:
- save a copy of the downloaded PDF
- enter your reference number provided on your email or postal letter: ENXXXXXXXX
- complete the questionnaire by answering all the relevant questions
- email your completed PDF to bus@stats.govt.nz .

### Get help with your R&D questionnaire
If your business is not currently performing any R&D, we still require a response from you. There are still questions you can answer, even if you did not undertake any R&D in the last financial year.
Contact us if you’re taking part in the R&D Survey and have any questions or need help.
0800 809 464 bus@stats.govt.nz

### Results from previous surveys
Research and development survey has the statistics we produced from previous surveys.
